input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-9101 to +8801719876543, which they believe may be the wrong recipient.
output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and start the wrong-transfer dispute workflow according to policy.
output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.

cases.label: Wrong transfer claim with inconsistent evidence

input.complaint: I sent 2000 to the wrong person by mistake. Please reverse it.

output.agent_summary: Customer claims TXN-9202 (2000 BDT to +8801812345678) was a wrong transfer, but transaction history shows repeated prior transfers to the same counterparty, suggesting an established recipient.
output.recommended_next_action: Flag for human review. Verify with the customer whether this was genuinely a wrong transfer given the established transaction pattern with this recipient.
output.customer_reply: We have received your request regarding transaction TXN-9202. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case carefully and contact you through official support channels.

input.complaint: I tried to pay 1200 taka for my mobile recharge but the app showed failed. But my balance was deducted! Please refund my money.

output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 1200 BDT payment (TXN-9301) which is marked failed, and reports balance deduction.
output.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9301 ledger status. If balance was deducted on a failed or pending payment, follow the eligible reversal workflow within the standard SLA.
output.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-9301 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: I paid 500 to a merchant for a product but I changed my mind and don't want it anymore. Please refund my 500 taka.

output.agent_summary: Customer requests refund of 500 BDT for TXN-9401 due to a customer-side request. Transaction status is completed.
output.recommended_next_action: Inform the customer that refund eligibility depends on policy and merchant confirmation. Do not promise a refund before verification.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Refunds for completed merchant payments depend on the merchant's own policy. We recommend contacting the merchant directly. If you need help reaching them, please reply and we will guide you. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: Someone called me saying they are from bKash and asked for my OTP. They said my account will be blocked if I don't share it. Is this real? I haven't shared anything yet.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports an unsolicited contact asking for OTP or credentials and says they have not shared the information. Likely social engineering attempt.
output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to fraud_risk immediately. Confirm that official support never asks for PIN, OTP, password, or full card details, and log any reported suspicious contact details.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances. Please do not share these with anyone, even if they claim to be from us. Our fraud team has been notified of this incident.

input.complaint: Something is wrong with my money. Please check.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports a vague concern without enough transaction, amount, or issue details to identify the relevant transaction.
output.recommended_next_action: Reply to customer asking for specific details: transaction ID, amount, what went wrong, and approximate time.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. To help you faster, please share the transaction ID, the amount involved, and a short description of what went wrong. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: আমি আজ সকালে এজেন্টের কাছে ২০০০ টাকা ক্যাশ ইন করেছি কিন্তু আমার ব্যালেন্সে টাকা আসেনি। এজেন্ট বলছে টাকা পাঠিয়েছে কিন্তু আমি দেখছি না।

output.agent_summary: Customer reports 2000 BDT cash-in via AGENT-318 (TXN-9701) not reflected in balance. Transaction status is pending.
output.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9701 status with agent_operations. Confirm settlement state and resolve within the standard cash-in SLA.
output.customer_reply: আপনার লেনদেন TXN-9701 এর বিষয়ে আমরা অবগত হয়েছি। আমাদের এজেন্ট অপারেশন্স দল এটি দ্রুত যাচাই করবে এবং অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলে আপনাকে জানাবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।

input.complaint: I sent 1000 to my brother yesterday but he says he didn't get it. Please check.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports a 1000 BDT transfer was not received or may involve the wrong recipient, but multiple or no matching transactions prevent reliable identification.
output.recommended_next_action: Ask the customer for the recipient number or transaction ID before initiating any dispute workflow.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We could not safely identify the exact transaction from the provided history. Please share the recipient number or transaction ID so we can check the right transfer. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: I am a merchant. My yesterday's sales of 15000 taka have not been settled to my account. Settlement usually happens by 11am next day. Please check.

output.agent_summary: Merchant reports 15000 BDT settlement (TXN-9901) is delayed. Settlement status is pending.
output.recommended_next_action: Route to merchant_operations to verify settlement batch status and communicate the expected settlement time through official channels.
output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about settlement TXN-9901. Our merchant operations team will check the batch status and update you on the expected settlement time through official channels.

input.complaint: I paid my electricity bill 850 taka but it deducted twice from my account. Please check, I only paid once.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports duplicate payment. Two identical 850 BDT payments to BILLER-DESCO were completed close together (TXN-10001 and TXN-10002). The second is likely the duplicate.
output.recommended_next_action: Verify the duplicate with payments_ops and the biller. If only one payment should stand, follow the eligible reversal workflow for TXN-10002.
output.customer_reply: We have noted the possible duplicate payment for transaction TXN-10002. Our payments team will verify with the biller and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
